case_title: SUE YAO MCWILLIAMS VS. FRANCISCO ELOISA GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-09-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONTESDEOCA, DAVID
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCWILLIAMS, SUE YAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, FRANCISCO ELOISA MONTESDEOCA, DAVID $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,595.00, FRANCISCO ELOISA GARCIA AND DAVID MONTESDEOCA, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY SHALL PAY PLAINITFF, SUE YAO MCWILLIAMS. THE COURT FINDS THE DAMAGES ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT EXCEED $7500.00 AND THAT DEFENDANTS ARE WHOLLY AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY MCWILLIAMS, SUE YAO GARCIA, FRANCISCO ELOISA
